title: That Old Black Magic: My One and Only Lute

startPoint.en: Speak to Lady Grey in the City of Um's bandstand.
startPoint.es: Habla con Lady Grey en el quiosco de música de la City of Um.

kills: Dragith Nurn (level 26; must be killed with necromancy)

rewards.name: Necromancy XP lamp (My One and Only Lute)

text.en: Talk to Lady Grey, behind Death in the City of Um and agree to get her guitar back. (opciones de chat: Accept)
text.es: Habla con Lady Grey, detrás de Death en la City of Um, y acepta recuperar su guitarra. (opciones de chat: Aceptar)

text.en: At the end of the catacombs, kill Dragith Nurn using necromancy and pick up Lady Grey's guitar.
text.es: Al final de las catacumbas, mata a Dragith Nurn usando nigromancia y recoge la guitarra de Lady Grey.

text.en: Return to the City of Um and speak to Lady Grey. Hand her the guitar. (opciones de chat: 1 Yes. • 1 Trumpeter. • 4 None right now.)
text.es: Vuelve a la City of Um y habla con Lady Grey. Entrégale la guitarra. (opciones de chat: 1 Sí. • 1 Trumpeter. • 4 Nada por ahora.)
